positive: A central, symmetrical illustration of a whimsical forest scene at twilight. The main subject is a collection of stylized, oversized bioluminescent mushrooms clustered around a winding, glowing path. Mixed in are delicate silhouettes of fantastical woodland creatures, such as glowing foxes and silent deer, interspersed with stylized, oversized ferns and lily pads. The style should be graphic, highly detailed yet clean, mimicking a modern etched botanical illustration mixed with Art Nouveau poster design. Use a deep, vibrant color palette dominated by indigo, emerald green, and electric cyan, with accents of warm gold and soft yellow from the glowing elements. Focus on strong, graphic silhouettes against a slightly darker background to maximize print contrast. Central composition, overhead view, perfect for apparel print.
negative: text, watermark, logo, signature, cropped, blurry, low resolution, poor anatomy, extra limbs, ugly, noise, artifact, bad perspective, dull colors
